Best Gift: Bee glasses is the best present for friends or yourself. Blessings on the wine glass: "Be yourself", "Be happy" and "Be kind".

description: The exclusive design of NymphFable makes the wine glass no longer simple and makes life more colorful. Enjoy the slow life, decorate your home with hand-painted wine glasses. Crafted with care: First hand-blown in crystal glass by senior glass artisans, and then sent to a painter to be drawn by brushstrokes. This is why our glasses are so collectible.
